verdict.answer_first: B: sentence 1 gives the bottom line and cause: "something is holding it"; A starts with definition: "socket is already bound".
verdict.decisiveness: A: both survey causes, but A ends with one diagnostic path: "Quickest triage... run lsof"; B splits into "kill <PID>" or "change your app's port".
verdict.fabrication: both invent user-specific context; A: "your machine specifically... PM2/launchd bridge"; B: "you run a PM2/launchd bridge (`mac-bridge-server`)".
verdict.actionability: A: more executable because it gives exact checks plus interpretation: "if lsof shows a PID that comes back after you kill it, it's #2".
